subject: Re: fresh air
body:
call me 340 775 8111

----- Original Message ----
From: "jpm6929@aol.com" <jpm6929@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Saturday, February 10, 2007 8:10:32 AM
Subject: fresh air


 Hi Jeffrey,

Everything is organized for next week.

To change subject, three interesting things:

Ponchartrin,the Chateau that is similar to Guermantes, BUT 10 TIMES INFERIOR IN INTERIORS, and closer to the highway, has a firm bid of 18 m. The owner is looking for nothing less than 22.m

Guy de R will LEND me a video of Lambert. (everything is soo secret!!!)

The Blue Palace on the Moika  in Saint Petersburg had cleared all the paperwork and can be sold now as one entity.

All the rest is good except that I broke a tooth with the door of a russian Land Rover.(?)  Regards, J.P.
